name: 4-chlorobenzoate to L-glutamate
summary: A 16-step route from 4-chlorobenzoate to L-glutamate, ingested from Rhea. Every step is curated by Rhea and independently verified here to balance in mass and charge.

reactions.name: phosphoethanolamine N-methyltransferase
reactions.equation: N-methylethanolamine phosphate + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = N,N-dimethylethanolamine phosphate + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + H(+)

reactions.name: biflaviolin synthase
reactions.equation: 2 flaviolin + 2 reduced [2Fe-2S]-[ferredoxin] + O2 + H(+) = 3,3'-biflaviolin + 2 oxidized [2Fe-2S]-[ferredoxin] + 2 H2O

reactions.name: biflaviolin synthase
reactions.equation: 2 flaviolin + 2 reduced [2Fe-2S]-[ferredoxin] + O2 + H(+) = 3,8'-biflaviolin + 2 oxidized [2Fe-2S]-[ferredoxin] + 2 H2O
